title: Encoding a Struct to JSON
instruction: Add json name and age tags to Person. Marshal p (not nil) and print.

title: Decoding JSON into a Struct
instruction: Unmarshal data into &p. Fix json.Unmarshal(nil, nil) to json.Unmarshal(data, &p).

title: omitempty and Custom Tags
instruction: Add Bio string with tag json:"bio,omitempty". Marshal two people; second has no Bio.

title: Encoding Maps and Slices
instruction: Marshal scores map and tags slice (not nil). Print both.
